The hotel "City Hub" is rated 4.3 and has the following reviews: "Great location in the heart of Shinjuku," "The hotel is modern and well-maintained," and "The room was compact but efficiently designed and had all the necessary amenities." The address of the hotel is 1-1-1 Nishi-Shinjuku, Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo 160-0023, Japan.

I have added an event titled "City Hub" to your calendar on January 2nd, 2025, with the address as the location. You can proceed to reserve the hotel when you're ready. Let me know if you need any further assistance!
